title: EQ - Saved Custom EQ, reset defaults - returns to Bass, but leaves custom not saved
scenario: Custom EQ settings are lost and sliders reset to default after performing Reset Defaults from Device Settings, with display incorrectly showing Bass preset
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Adjust slider values to create a custom EQ profile
Tap Save to save the custom EQ preset
expected: After Reset Defaults, the EQ display should show the custom EQ preset that was saved, with the slider values retaining the custom settings.
